CLM-2026-0041.content: [Voice note: JCB tip ho gaya site pe, boom arm bend, hydraulic line phoot gayi]

Namaste Rajesh ji! Maine aapka voice note sun liya. Samajh aa raha hai — JCB tip ho gaya hai site pe aur boom arm bend ho gaya hai, hydraulic line bhi phoot gayi.

Main abhi aapki claim process start karta hoon. Kuch cheezein confirm kar lijiye:

• Vehicle: JCB 3DX — OD-02-BQ-7734
• Policy: ICICI Lombard (POL-IL-20260041)
• Location: Chandaka Industrial Area
• Equifi Loan: Active, EMIs current

Ye sab correct hai kya?
haan sahi hai.. bahut tension ho raha hai bhai. kaam ruk gaya poora 😰

Rajesh ji, tension mat lijiye — hum handle kar rahe hain. 💪

Abhi sabse pehle — damage ke photos chahiye. Jo bhi damage hua hai — boom arm, hydraulic line, body — sab ke photos bhejiye. Close-up bhi aur full machine ka bhi.

Specially hydraulic line ka close-up zaroor bhejiye — insurer isko check karta hai.
photos bhej diye 8 photos.. dekh lo

Photos mil gaye — 8 photos received. 👍

Photos clear hain, damage properly visible hai. Ab main ICICI Lombard ko intimation bhej raha hoon.

📤 Intimation submitted — Ref: ICL-CLM-2026-0041

Ab aage kya hoga:
1. ICICI apna surveyor bhejega — M.K. Rao & Associates assign hue hain
2. Inspection 27th March ko scheduled hai
3. Uske baad repair authorize hoga

FIR ki zarurat nahi hai kyunki yeh construction site pe hua hai, no third party. Main sab track kar raha hoon — har update milega.
kitna time lagega repair start hone mein?

Normally surveyor 2-3 din mein aata hai, uske baad report 3-4 din. Total around 7-10 din mein repair start ho sakta hai.

But main push kar raha hoon ki jaldi ho — aapka machine idle hai toh revenue loss ho raha hai, ye main insurer ko bhi communicate karunga.

Ek suggestion — JCB authorized service center use karna best rahega. Cashless claim hoga, aapko apni jeb se kuch nahi dena padega.

Aapke Equifi loan account pe bhi flag laga diya hai — taaki EMI related koi issue na ho during claim period. 👍
ok bhai.. thnks. update dete rehna
Bilkul! Har step pe update dunga. Aap aaram se kaam dekhiye, claim ki tension humpe chhod dijiye. 🤝

CLM-2026-0042.content: [Voice note: Tata Signa accident on NH-16, divider se takraya, front axle damage, cabin dented]

Suresh ji! Maine aapka message suna. Bahut bura hua — Tata Signa tipper ka accident NH-16 pe hua hai. Divider se takraya hai, front axle damage, cabin dented.

Sabse pehle — driver theek hai? Koi injury?
driver ko thodi chot aayi hai.. haath mein. hospital le gaye hain abhi. gaadi road pe hi khadi hai

Driver ka dhyan rakhiye pehle. 🙏

Main claim process shuru karta hoon. Kuch important baatein:

⚠️ FIR ZAROOR FILE KAREIN — Ye NH pe hua hai aur highway divider (sarkari property) damage hui hai. Bina FIR ke insurer claim reject kar dega.

Kya driver ya koi aur FIR file kar sakta hai aaj?
haan bhai mein khud jaunga thane.. lekin pehle gaadi ka kya kare? tow karwa lein?

⚠️ Gaadi ko abhi move MAT kijiye!

Front axle damage hai — gaadi chalane se aur zyada damage hoga, aur insurer dispute kar sakta hai ki damage drive karne se hua.

Tow karwayiye — lekin authorized service center tak. Main Tata Motors authorized center ka address bhejta hoon.

Pehle — damage ke photos bhejiye abhi jo bhi le sakte hain. Gaadi ke, divider ke, road ke — sab kuch.

Mainne Bajaj Allianz ko intimation bhej diya hai. Aapka loan account bhi flag hua hai — Equifi RM ko inform kiya hai.

CLM-2026-0035.content: [Voice note: Komatsu excavator kharab ho gaya quarry pe, bucket tooth toot gaya, track bhi damage]

Manish ji, aapka Komatsu PC210 claim settled ho gaya hai! 🎉

Final summary:
• Claimed: ₹1,12,000
• Assessed by surveyor: ₹1,05,000 (depreciation adjustment)
• ICICI Lombard settlement: ₹98,500
• Depreciation deduction: ₹13,500 (IRDAI guidelines ke as per)

Settlement amount ₹98,500 aapke account mein process ho gaya hai.

Repair Komatsu Authorized workshop, Jatni mein complete ho chuki hai. Vehicle ready for pickup!

Aapke loan account (EQF-LN-2023-0541) se bhi claim flag hata diya gaya hai. Sab clean hai.

Koi aur query ho toh zaroor puchiye. ClaimPilot always here! 🙏
thank u bhai! bahut smooth process tha. ek question — depreciation kyun kata? bucket toh metal ka hai.

Bahut accha question Manish ji!

Depreciation breakdown:
• Metal parts (bucket, track links) — 0% depreciation (IRDAI rules mein metal pe nahi lagta first year)
• Rubber parts (track pads, seals) — 50% depreciation
• Plastic/fibre parts — 30% depreciation

Aapke case mein:
• Track pads (rubber) ka replacement tha — ₹18,000 pe 50% = ₹9,000 depreciation
• Hydraulic seals (rubber) — ₹9,000 pe 50% = ₹4,500 depreciation
• Total depreciation: ₹13,500

Yeh IRDAI ke Motor Vehicle Insurance guidelines ke as per hai — har insurance company follow karti hai. Metal bucket pe koi depreciation nahi kata gaya.

Next time ke liye tip: agar zero-depreciation add-on liya ho toh yeh bhi cover hota. Policy renewal pe consider karein! 👍
